name: Server & Compute
description: Linux, Windows, macOS endpoint and server monitoring — CPU, memory, disk, processes, security events, and compliance.
quickTip: Deploy Splunk_TA_nix or Splunk_TA_windows on forwarders to start collecting OS metrics immediately.

subcategories.name: Linux Servers
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Add-on for Unix and Linux (`Splunk_TA_nix`) — Splunkbase #833

subcategories.name: Windows Servers
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Windows (`Splunk_TA_windows`) — Free on Splunkbase

subcategories.name: macOS Endpoints
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Universal Forwarder for macOS with custom scripted inputs (no official Splunkbase TA — use Splunk_TA_nix where applicable, or custom inputs)

subcategories.name: Bare-Metal / Hardware
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Custom scripted inputs (`ipmitool`, `smartctl`, `storcli`), vendor management APIs (iDRAC/iLO), SNMP Modular Input
